design_principles: Fusion over Imitation: Combine high-end premium automotive/aerospace web design cues with heavy machinery presentation.
Emotion First: The design must feel 'heavy' and 'precise'. Use dark, stark contrast to evoke the durability of steel and the heat of manufacturing.
Contrast: Use Deep Obsidian base against blinding Industrial Orange and bright steel white for sharp, blueprint-like clarity.
Structural Grids: Emphasize 'The Technical Look' with exposed grid borders to reflect engineering structure.
Data-Driven Storytelling: Highlight 14+ years of experience and machinery specs clearly, treating numbers as art.

guidelines: Headings should use Clash Display with tight tracking to simulate heavy, solid block text.
Overlines and labels must be uppercase, monospace (IBM Plex Mono), and widely tracked (tracking-[0.2em]) for a blueprint/spec-sheet feel.
Body text should remain readable and crisp in IBM Plex Sans.

layout.spacing_system: Generous spacing philosophy. Use p-8, p-12, p-16 for section breathing room.
layout.grid_strategy: The 'Control Room' Grid & Technical Borders: Expose the skeleton using border-collapse styles. Use strict bento boxes for the product catalog with 1px border-border borders.
surface_treatment: Containers: Flat backgrounds, 1px sharp border (border-border), zero shadow.
Hover states: Sharp -translate-y-1 lift with industrial orange bottom-border accent.
Navigation: Crystal Glassmorphism over the dark background (bg-black/60 backdrop-blur-xl border-b border-white/10).

buttons.primary: Square or very slightly rounded (rounded-sm). Solid Industrial Orange (#FF5722) background, white text. No gradients. Hover state slightly brightens.
buttons.secondary: Transparent background, 1px solid steel border (#4B5563), white text. Hover state fills with surface elevated color.
buttons.floating_cta: Fixed bottom-right corner. High-contrast icon buttons (WhatsApp, Phone) with drop-shadow and quick-pulse animation.

cards.product: Bento style. Image taking up 60% of card height, dark overlay gradient at bottom. Spec sheet snippet visible. Hover zooms image slightly inside container.
cards.testimonial: Technical layout. Quote in monospace or italic serif, rating in bright orange stars, reviewer details structured like a data table.

forms.inputs: Flat dark inputs (bg-surface_elevated), square corners (rounded-none or rounded-sm), border-b-2 only (border-border), focus state changes border-b to primary orange.

motion.strategy: Heavy and deliberate. Things should feel like they carry physical weight. Fast snappy transitions are banned.

framer_motion.hero_reveal: Slow vertical slide up with opacity fade in (duration: 0.8s, ease: custom cubic-bezier).
framer_motion.scroll_parallax: Subtle parallax on heavy machinery background images using React Spring or Framer Motion.

images.description: Welding worker in dark environment with bright sparks. Perfect for hero section overlay.
Wide shot of a massive industrial factory floor. Good for About Us section.
Close up of heavy, greasy machinery showing industrial steel texture.
Worker with glowing metal/sparks, representing heat and manufacturing.
Abstract shot of heavy steel piping, excellent for background textures or footer.

icons.style: Duotone or Regular weight. Must look technical and crisp.

accessibility.contrast: Ensure white text on #050505 passes APCA standards. All orange buttons must have white text.
accessibility.testing_attributes: CRITICAL: All interactive elements (buttons, inputs, links, forms) MUST include a data-testid attribute formatted as kebab-case and role-based (e.g., data-testid='hero-cta-button', data-testid='contact-form-submit').

instructions_to_main_agent: Install and configure dependencies: framer-motion, @phosphor-icons/react, lucide-react, react-hook-form, zod.
For the UI, avoid generic Shadcn card defaults. Strip out border-radius to 0 or 2px max. Implement the 'Technical Grid Border' style for the product catalogue.
Ensure the hero image uses a max overlay opacity of bg-black/50, or a gradient overlay for text readability.

Build a Bento-style product grid for the 8 machines listed in the requirements. Use placeholder product images or abstract machinery details from the media section if specific product photos aren't available, but DO NOT use placeholder text services.
Create a dedicated About Us section highlighting 14+ years experience, Khopoli location, and proprietorship.
Implement a contact form tailored for lead gen (Name, Phone, Email, Product Interest dropdown, Message).
Include floating CTAs for WhatsApp and Phone for instant B2B contact.
Ensure mobile responsiveness is flawless, as B2B buyers in India will predominantly use mobile.
